description_long: This object is a cylindrical loaf of bread with a golden-brown, slightly matte crust that appears evenly baked. The ends of the loaf reveal a porous, airy crumb structure with small to medium holes, typical of rustic or artisan bread. The crust is smooth with a subtle, fine texture and lacks any visible scoring, seeds, or flour dusting. The coloration is consistent, with a warm tan to light brown hue dominating the exterior. The bread appears unsliced and whole, with no visible branding or packaging. Its size and shape suggest it could be a baguette or a similar type of bread commonly found in urban bakeries or markets.
description: A cylindrical, golden-brown loaf of bread with a smooth, matte crust and an airy, porous interior. The bread is unsliced and has a consistent tan coloration.
description_view_0: The end view shows the porous, airy crumb structure with small holes and a light brown coloration.
description_view_1: The side view displays the smooth, golden-brown crust with a matte finish and no visible markings.
description_view_2: The opposite end view reveals a similar porous crumb, with slightly darker spots and a rustic texture.
description_view_3: Another side view of the loaf, showing the even, matte crust and consistent coloration.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and evenly colored, with a fine, matte texture and no visible scoring, seeds, or flour dusting.
